features: HEALTHY GLOW: Nuage Argan Oil Cleansing Wipes harness the powers of Argan Oil, to wipe away dirt while infusing skin with nutrients and moisture leaving you with a natural healthy glow.
BEAUTY BOOST: Enriched with Argan oil and Chamomile extract, to cleanse, moisturise and freshen the skin. Suitable for all skin types.
SENSITIVE SKIN: Suitable for all skin types, Argan oil is kind to inflamed skin including eczema and acne. Perfect for use daily, all year round.
TWIN PACK SIZE: Nuage Argan Oil Cleansing Wipes, supplied in resealable packs of 25 wipes. Two packs supplied
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Twin Pack. Each resealable pack contains 25 wipes
description: Product Description Nuage Argan Oil Cleansing Wipes harness the powers of Argan Oil, to wipe away dirt while infusing skin with nutrients and moisture leaving you with a natural healthy glow. Enriched with Argan oil and Chamomile extract, to cleanse, moisturise and freshen the skin. Argan oil is kind to inflamed skin including eczema and acne. Perfect for use daily, all year round. Suitable for all skin types. Twin Pack. Each resealable pack contains 25 wipes Directions Use wipe to clean face and neck Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. See more
